title: Config
description: Repo Butler runtime configuration. Read from .github/roadmap.yml in the target repository and deep-merged with defaults from src/config.js. The YAML parser is hand-rolled and supports flat and one-level-nested keys only.

repository.description: Target repository in owner/repo format. Set at the top level of the YAML file.

path.description: Path to the roadmap file within the target repository

assess.description: How often the ASSESS phase runs

ideate.description: How often the IDEATE phase runs

default.description: Default LLM provider to use when no phase-specific override is set

context.description: Project context string injected verbatim into LLM prompts. Supports YAML block scalar (|) for multi-line content.

limits.description: Resource and policy limits for the PROPOSE phase

max_issues_per_run.description: Maximum number of GitHub issues the PROPOSE phase creates per pipeline run

require_approval.description: When true, proposed issues are created with an approval label and require human confirmation before further action

labels.description: Label names used by the agent

proposal.description: Label applied to AI-proposed issues awaiting approval

agent.description: Label applied to all issues created by the agent

observe.description: Lookback window and fetch-count settings for the OBSERVE phase

issues_closed_days.description: Number of days to look back when fetching recently-closed issues

prs_merged_days.description: Number of days to look back when fetching recently-merged PRs

releases_count.description: Maximum number of recent releases to fetch
